Advanced Yield Farming Strategies for 2026

  • Home
  • news
defi

Yield farming has evolved significantly since the DeFi Summer of 2020. Here are the most effective strategies for 2026.

Strategy 1: Concentrated Liquidity

Providing concentrated liquidity on DEXs like Uniswap V3 allows you to earn higher fees by focusing your capital in specific price ranges.

Strategy 2: Recursive Lending

Supplying assets, borrowing against them, and resupplying can amplify your yields, though it also increases risk.

Strategy 3: Real Yield Protocols

Focus on protocols that generate revenue from real economic activity rather than token emissions. These tend to be more sustainable long-term.

Risk Management

Never invest more than you can afford to lose. Diversify across protocols and chains, and always monitor your positions.
